channel.title: Synthetic Local Feed
channel.description: Offline synthetic feed for Milestone 0 tests.

item.title: 阿尔派机器人推出新一代维护平台
item.description: 虚构公司阿尔派机器人发布维护平台，预计提升售后服务效率，但短期收入贡献仍不确定。

item.title: NovaMed appoints new chief operating officer
item.description: The synthetic device maker NovaMed appointed a new operating chief after a planned leadership review.

item.title: HelioStorage signs non-binding merger discussion memo
item.description: HelioStorage said early merger discussions are non-binding and may not result in a transaction.
